Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants to construct an accepting Petri net using pm4py for an insurance claim management process Process steps

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Start place start Transition Insurance Claim label Insurance Claim name C Place p1 Transition Claim Registration label Claim Registration name CR Place p2 Transition Document Verification label Document Verification name DV Place p3

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We need a choice From p3 go to CA Claim Assessment Wait the prompt says In some cases if documents are incomplete after Document Verification DV a re submission of documents step occurs Re Document Submission RDS before the process continues

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait does RDS go back to DV after Document Verification DV a re submission of documents step occurs Re Document Submission RDS before the process continues Similarly if the Fraud Check FC raises doubts an additional In depth Investigation II is performed This can happen multiple times before proceeding to Claim Assessment CA

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets structure the sequence start to C to p1 to CR to p2 to DV to p3 to FC to p4 to CA to p5 to AP to p6 to P to p7 to N to p8 to CL to end

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This sounds like a loop or a parallel path before the process continues Maybe DV to p3 If incomplete RDS to DV Or DV to RDS to FC

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Lets just use a loop DV to p_dv From p_dv we can go to FC or we can go to RDS which goes back to DV

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait if RDS happens before FC then p3 to RDS to p3 Lets make p2 to DV to p3 p3 to RDS to p2 if RDS requires another DV

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: At FC if II is needed p4 to II to p4 multiple times Then p4 to CA to p5

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait the prompt says between FC and II if in depth investigation is required multiple times This could mean FC to II to FC Lets do p3 to t_fc to p4 p4 to t_ii to p3

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This perfectly matches between FC and II and between DV and RDS p3 to t_rds to p2

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The places are added the transitions are labeled with activity names The loops are placed correctly between DV and RDS and FC and II Initial marking is start final marking is end
